commands.review_summary:
The PR installs a Matrix crypto-runtime fake-indexeddb transaction pruner scoped to `::matrix-sdk-crypto` and `::matrix-sdk-crypto-meta`, with focused pruning tests.

PR surface: Source +122, Tests +126. Total +248 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source/proof level: current Matrix uses fake-indexeddb 6.2.5 for rust-crypto stores, upstream retains finished transactions, and the PR body shows after-fix Node live output. I did not run a live Matrix E2EE sync in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is needed; maintainers need to accept or reject the Matrix-scoped private dependency shim and wait for required checks.
